title: 「in case 句」句型
titleEn: Using in case to express a precaution

source.file: Sentence Structure 26 -「in case 句」表示「以防／以免」.pdf
omissions: The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
meaning.en is an editorial summary of the bilingual exercise purpose and precaution rule.

formula: Main clause showing a precaution + in case + subject + present simple / past simple

formulas.formula: Main clause showing a precaution + in case + subject + present simple / past simple
In case + subject + present simple / past simple, + main clause showing a precaution

example: People often take medicine with them on trips in case they get sick.
exampleZh: 人們旅行時常會隨身帶備藥物，以防生病。

examples.en: People often take medicine with them on trips in case they get sick.
examples.zh: 人們旅行時常會隨身帶備藥物，以防生病。

meaning.en: Use in case to show that an action is taken in advance as a precaution against a possible situation.
meaning.zh: 使用 in case 表示為可能發生的情況預先採取措施。

benefits.en: It clearly shows that an action is a precaution. The reader understands that someone is preparing for a situation that may or may not happen.
benefits.zh: 清楚表示某人正在為一個可能發生、也可能不會發生的情況預先作準備。

benefits.en: It connects the preparation and the possible problem in one complete sentence.
benefits.zh: 把預防措施和可能出現的情況連接成一個完整句子。

benefits.en: It makes the timing clearer: the preparation happens first and the possible event may happen later.
benefits.zh: 令時間關係更清楚：預防措施先發生，而另一個情況可能在之後發生。

benefits.en: It is useful in many real-life situations involving travel, health, safety, technology, work and daily arrangements.
benefits.zh: 適合用於旅行、健康、安全、科技、工作及日常安排等實際情境。

benefits.en: It gives you another way to explain a possible risk instead of repeatedly using because something might happen.
benefits.zh: 提供另一種解釋可能風險的方法，不需要反覆使用 because something might happen。

rules.en: The main action is a precaution. The action in the main clause is normally performed before the possible situation happens.
rules.zh: 主句中的行動是預防措施，通常會在可能發生的情況之前完成，目的是預先作好準備。
examples: Take an umbrella in case it rains.

rules.en: Use a complete clause containing a subject and a verb after in case.
rules.zh: in case 後面要接一個包含主語和動詞的完整子句。
examples: Correct: in case the weather changes
Correct: in case you need help

rules.en: Do not normally use will after in case. For a possible future event, use the present simple.
rules.zh: 當句子表示未來可能發生的情況時，in case 後通常使用現在式，而不是 will。
examples: Correct: Take a jacket in case it gets cold.
Incorrect: Take a jacket in case it will get cold.

rules.en: Use the past simple for a past precaution. When the precaution was taken in the past, the in case clause normally uses the past simple.
rules.zh: 如果預防措施在過去發生，in case 子句通常使用過去式。
examples: She brought a map in case her phone stopped working.

rules.en: In case can appear at the beginning or end. When the in case clause comes first, place a comma after it.
rules.zh: in case 子句可以放在主句後面，也可以放在句首；如果放在句首，子句後要使用逗號。
examples: Keep the receipt in case you need it.
In case you need the receipt, keep it in a safe place.

rules.en: In case is different from if. In case shows action taken before a possible situation as a precaution; if normally means that an action happens only when a condition becomes true.
rules.zh: in case 與 if 不同。in case 表示在某個情況可能發生之前先採取預防措施；if 通常表示只有在條件成真後才採取相關行動。
examples: I will take an umbrella in case it rains.
I will use the umbrella if it rains.

rules.en: In case is followed by a complete clause, whereas in case of is followed by a noun phrase. This lesson focuses on in case + complete clause.
rules.zh: in case 後接完整子句；in case of 後接名詞片語。本練習集中訓練 in case + 完整子句。

sourceOmissions: The PDF supplies the lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.
meaning.en is an editorial summary of the bilingual exercise purpose and precaution rule.

en: Rewrite each sentence using in case to show a precaution against a possible situation.
Preserve the original meaning and tense.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 in case 改寫以下句子，表示為可能發生的情況預先採取措施。
答案必須保留原句的意思和時態。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: It might rain later, so I took an umbrella with me.
questions.promptZh: 稍後可能會下雨，所以我帶了一把雨傘。
questions.answer: I took an umbrella with me in case it rained later.
questions.answerZh: 我帶了一把雨傘，以防稍後下雨。
questions.highlight: I took an umbrella with me in case it rained later.

questions.prompt: Lily carries some tissues because she may need them during the day.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉隨身帶備紙巾，因為她日間可能會用得上。
questions.answer: Lily carries some tissues in case she needs them during the day.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉隨身帶備紙巾，以防日間有需要。
questions.highlight: Lily carries some tissues in case she needs them during the day.

questions.prompt: The children might get hungry, so we packed some snacks.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們可能會肚餓，所以我們帶備了一些小食。
questions.answer: We packed some snacks in case the children got hungry.
questions.answerZh: 我們帶備了一些小食，以防孩子們肚餓。
questions.highlight: We packed some snacks in case the children got hungry.

questions.prompt: Ben wrote down the address because he was worried that he might forget it.
questions.promptZh: 本寫下了地址，因為他擔心自己可能會忘記。
questions.answer: Ben wrote down the address in case he forgot it.
questions.answerZh: 本寫下了地址，以防自己忘記。
questions.highlight: Ben wrote down the address in case he forgot it.

questions.prompt: Mia charges her phone before leaving because the battery may run low while she is out.
questions.promptZh: 米婭出門前為電話充電，因為她外出時電量可能會變低。
questions.answer: Mia charges her phone before leaving in case the battery runs low while she is out.
questions.answerZh: 米婭出門前為電話充電，以防外出時電量不足。
questions.highlight: Mia charges her phone before leaving in case the battery runs low while she is out.

questions.prompt: Why did Jack bring a jacket? He thought the weather might become cold.
questions.promptZh: 傑克為甚麼帶外套？他認為天氣可能會轉冷。
questions.answer: Jack brought a jacket in case the weather became cold.
questions.answerZh: 傑克帶了外套，以防天氣轉冷。
questions.highlight: Jack brought a jacket in case the weather became cold.

questions.prompt: The shop may not accept cards, so take some cash with you.
questions.promptZh: 店舖可能不接受信用卡，所以請帶備一些現金。
questions.answer: Take some cash with you in case the shop does not accept cards.
questions.answerZh: 請帶備一些現金，以防店舖不接受信用卡。
questions.highlight: Take some cash with you in case the shop does not accept cards.

questions.prompt: Emma may get thirsty, so she keeps a bottle of water in her bag.
questions.promptZh: 艾瑪可能會口渴，所以她在袋中放了一瓶水。
questions.answer: Emma keeps a bottle of water in her bag in case she gets thirsty.
questions.answerZh: 艾瑪在袋中放了一瓶水，以防口渴。
questions.highlight: Emma keeps a bottle of water in her bag in case she gets thirsty.

questions.prompt: The driver checked the spare tyre because he might have a flat tyre on the road.
questions.promptZh: 司機檢查了後備輪胎，因為他在路上可能會遇上輪胎漏氣。
questions.answer: The driver checked the spare tyre in case he had a flat tyre on the road.
questions.answerZh: 司機檢查了後備輪胎，以防在路上遇上輪胎漏氣。
questions.highlight: The driver checked the spare tyre in case he had a flat tyre on the road.

questions.prompt: Our teacher printed extra worksheets so that she would be prepared if more students joined the class.
questions.promptZh: 老師多印了一些工作紙，好讓自己在有更多學生加入課堂時有所準備。
questions.answer: Our teacher printed extra worksheets in case more students joined the class.
questions.answerZh: 老師多印了一些工作紙，以防有更多學生加入課堂。
questions.highlight: Our teacher printed extra worksheets in case more students joined the class.

questions.prompt: Sarah does not want to lose her work if the computer suddenly crashes, so she saves it every ten minutes.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉不想在電腦突然故障時遺失工作，所以她每十分鐘儲存一次。
questions.answer: Sarah saves her work every ten minutes in case the computer suddenly crashes.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉每十分鐘儲存一次工作，以防電腦突然故障。
questions.highlight: Sarah saves her work every ten minutes in case the computer suddenly crashes.

questions.prompt: David wanted a second alarm ready if the first one failed to wake him, so he set two alarms.
questions.promptZh: 大衛希望在第一個鬧鐘未能叫醒他時仍有另一個鬧鐘，所以他設定了兩個鬧鐘。
questions.answer: David set two alarms in case the first one did not wake him.
questions.answerZh: 大衛設定了兩個鬧鐘，以防第一個鬧鐘未能叫醒他。
questions.highlight: David set two alarms in case the first one did not wake him.

questions.prompt: This key is kept at reception because a guest may lose their room key.
questions.promptZh: 這把鑰匙存放在接待處，因為客人可能會遺失房間鑰匙。
questions.answer: This key is kept at reception in case a guest loses their room key.
questions.answerZh: 這把鑰匙存放在接待處，以防客人遺失房間鑰匙。
questions.highlight: This key is kept at reception in case a guest loses their room key.

questions.prompt: Amy brought a map because her phone might not connect to the internet.
questions.promptZh: 艾米帶了一張地圖，因為她的電話可能無法連接互聯網。
questions.answer: Amy brought a map in case her phone could not connect to the internet.
questions.answerZh: 艾米帶了一張地圖，以防她的電話無法連接互聯網。
questions.highlight: Amy brought a map in case her phone could not connect to the internet.

questions.prompt: You may need to return the item later, so keep the receipt.
questions.promptZh: 你稍後可能需要退回貨品，所以請保留收據。
questions.answer: Keep the receipt in case you need to return the item later.
questions.answerZh: 請保留收據，以防稍後需要退回貨品。
questions.highlight: Keep the receipt in case you need to return the item later.

questions.prompt: Kevin's laptop might stop working, so he copied the important files onto a USB drive.
questions.promptZh: 凱文的手提電腦可能會停止運作，所以他把重要檔案複製到 USB 儲存裝置。
questions.answer: Kevin copied the important files onto a USB drive in case his laptop stopped working.
questions.answerZh: 凱文把重要檔案複製到 USB 儲存裝置，以防手提電腦停止運作。
questions.highlight: Kevin copied the important files onto a USB drive in case his laptop stopped working.

questions.prompt: Why does the nurse keep extra masks nearby? More patients may arrive.
questions.promptZh: 護士為甚麼在附近放置額外口罩？可能會有更多病人到來。
questions.answer: The nurse keeps extra masks nearby in case more patients arrive.
questions.answerZh: 護士在附近放置額外口罩，以防有更多病人到來。
questions.highlight: The nurse keeps extra masks nearby in case more patients arrive.

questions.prompt: We chose an indoor table as a precaution against possible rain during lunch.
questions.promptZh: 我們選擇了室內座位，以預防午膳期間可能下雨。
questions.answer: We chose an indoor table in case it rained during lunch.
questions.answerZh: 我們選擇了室內座位，以防午膳期間下雨。
questions.highlight: We chose an indoor table in case it rained during lunch.

questions.prompt: Chloe was worried that she might become nervous and forget part of her speech, so she wrote it on cards.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊擔心自己可能會緊張並忘記部分演辭，所以她把內容寫在卡片上。
questions.answer: Chloe wrote her speech on cards in case she became nervous and forgot part of it.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊把演辭寫在卡片上，以防自己緊張並忘記部分內容。
questions.highlight: Chloe wrote her speech on cards in case she became nervous and forgot part of it.

questions.prompt: The coach wanted a replacement ready if any player was unable to attend, so he invited an extra player.
questions.promptZh: 教練希望在有球員未能出席時有後備人選，所以他邀請了一名額外球員。
questions.answer: The coach invited an extra player in case someone was unable to attend.
questions.answerZh: 教練邀請了一名額外球員，以防有人未能出席。
questions.highlight: The coach invited an extra player in case someone was unable to attend.

questions.prompt: Heavy traffic is possible, so Olivia leaves home early.
questions.promptZh: 路面可能會嚴重擠塞，所以奧莉花提早離家。
questions.answer: Olivia leaves home early in case there is heavy traffic.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花提早離家，以防交通擠塞。
questions.highlight: Olivia leaves home early in case there is heavy traffic.

questions.prompt: A backup generator was installed so that the hospital could continue operating if it lost power.
questions.promptZh: 醫院安裝了後備發電機，以便在停電時仍可繼續運作。
questions.answer: A backup generator was installed in case the hospital lost power.
questions.answerZh: 醫院安裝了後備發電機，以防停電。
questions.highlight: A backup generator was installed in case the hospital lost power.

questions.prompt: Daniel wore gloves because there was a risk that the paint might damage his skin.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾戴上手套，因為油漆有可能傷害他的皮膚。
questions.answer: Daniel wore gloves in case the paint damaged his skin.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾戴上手套，以防油漆傷害皮膚。
questions.highlight: Daniel wore gloves in case the paint damaged his skin.

questions.prompt: The hotel may ask to see your passport, so you should take it with you.
questions.promptZh: 酒店可能會要求查看你的護照，所以你應該隨身攜帶。
questions.answer: You should take your passport with you in case the hotel asks to see it.
questions.answerZh: 你應該隨身攜帶護照，以防酒店要求查看。
questions.highlight: You should take your passport with you in case the hotel asks to see it.

questions.prompt: Grace may need help in an emergency, so she keeps the emergency number on her phone.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲在緊急情況下可能需要協助，所以她把緊急電話號碼儲存在電話內。
questions.answer: Grace keeps the emergency number on her phone in case she needs help.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲把緊急電話號碼儲存在電話內，以防需要協助。
questions.highlight: Grace keeps the emergency number on her phone in case she needs help.

questions.prompt: The museum keeps printed guides available so that visitors still have information if the audio system is not working.
questions.promptZh: 博物館備有印刷指南，好讓訪客在語音系統無法運作時仍可取得資料。
questions.answer: The museum has printed guides in case the audio system is not working.
questions.answerZh: 博物館備有印刷指南，以防語音系統無法運作。
questions.highlight: The museum has printed guides in case the audio system is not working.

questions.prompt: Noah left a spare key with his neighbour because he was afraid that he might get locked out.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞把後備鑰匙交給鄰居，因為他擔心自己可能會被鎖在門外。
questions.answer: Noah left a spare key with his neighbour in case he got locked out.
questions.answerZh: 諾亞把後備鑰匙交給鄰居，以防自己被鎖在門外。
questions.highlight: Noah left a spare key with his neighbour in case he got locked out.

questions.prompt: The organisers prepared more chairs because there was a chance that a larger crowd would arrive.
questions.promptZh: 主辦單位準備了更多椅子，因為可能會有更多人到場。
questions.answer: The organisers prepared more chairs in case a larger crowd arrived.
questions.answerZh: 主辦單位準備了更多椅子，以防有更多人到場。
questions.highlight: The organisers prepared more chairs in case a larger crowd arrived.

questions.prompt: Why did Sofia bring some medicine? She thought she might feel sick on the boat.
questions.promptZh: 蘇菲亞為甚麼帶備藥物？她認為自己在船上可能會不適。
questions.answer: Sofia brought some medicine in case she felt sick on the boat.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲亞帶備了一些藥物，以防在船上感到不適。
questions.highlight: Sofia brought some medicine in case she felt sick on the boat.

questions.prompt: Customers sometimes need change, so the shop keeps coins and small notes at the till.
questions.promptZh: 顧客有時需要找續，所以店舖在收銀處存放硬幣和小面額鈔票。
questions.answer: The shop keeps coins and small notes at the till in case customers need change.
questions.answerZh: 店舖在收銀處存放硬幣和小面額鈔票，以防顧客需要找續。
questions.highlight: The shop keeps coins and small notes at the till in case customers need change.

questions.prompt: The lift may stop working, so keep the stairs beside the main entrance clear.
questions.promptZh: 升降機可能會停止運作，所以請保持正門旁的樓梯暢通。
questions.answer: In case the lift stops working, keep the stairs beside the main entrance clear.
questions.answerZh: 以防升降機停止運作，請保持正門旁的樓梯暢通。
questions.highlight: In case the lift stops working, keep the stairs beside the main entrance clear.

questions.prompt: A student might have an allergic reaction, so the teacher carries the students' medical information.
questions.promptZh: 學生可能會出現過敏反應，所以老師隨身攜帶學生的醫療資料。
questions.answer: In case anyone has an allergic reaction, the teacher carries the students' medical information.
questions.answerZh: 以防有人出現過敏反應，老師會隨身攜帶學生的醫療資料。
questions.highlight: In case anyone has an allergic reaction, the teacher carries the students' medical information.

questions.prompt: Marcus took a photograph of the parking space because he might be unable to find the car later.
questions.promptZh: 馬庫斯拍下了泊車位置，因為他稍後可能找不到汽車。
questions.answer: Marcus took a photograph of the parking space in case he could not find the car later.
questions.answerZh: 馬庫斯拍下了泊車位置，以防稍後找不到汽車。
questions.highlight: Marcus took a photograph of the parking space in case he could not find the car later.

questions.prompt: The library uses paper records as a backup because the computer system may go down.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館使用紙本紀錄作為後備，因為電腦系統可能會停止運作。
questions.answer: The library uses paper records as a backup in case the computer system goes down.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館使用紙本紀錄作為後備，以防電腦系統停止運作。
questions.highlight: The library uses paper records as a backup in case the computer system goes down.

questions.prompt: The train may be delayed, so Aisha has saved the bus timetable on her phone.
questions.promptZh: 火車可能會延誤，所以艾莎已把巴士時間表儲存在電話內。
questions.answer: In case the train is delayed, Aisha has saved the bus timetable on her phone.
questions.answerZh: 以防火車延誤，艾莎已把巴士時間表儲存在電話內。
questions.highlight: In case the train is delayed, Aisha has saved the bus timetable on her phone.

questions.prompt: The chef prepared an extra vegetarian dish because one of the guests might not eat meat.
questions.promptZh: 廚師多準備了一道素菜，因為其中一位客人可能不吃肉。
questions.answer: The chef prepared an extra vegetarian dish in case one of the guests did not eat meat.
questions.answerZh: 廚師多準備了一道素菜，以防其中一位客人不吃肉。
questions.highlight: The chef prepared an extra vegetarian dish in case one of the guests did not eat meat.

questions.prompt: It may get dark before we return, so we should bring a torch.
questions.promptZh: 我們回來前天色可能會變黑，所以應該帶備電筒。
questions.answer: We should bring a torch in case it gets dark before we return.
questions.answerZh: 我們應該帶備電筒，以防回來前天色變黑。
questions.highlight: We should bring a torch in case it gets dark before we return.

questions.prompt: One message might not arrive, so Ethan sent the meeting link by email and text.
questions.promptZh: 其中一則訊息可能無法送達，所以伊森透過電郵和短訊發送會議連結。
questions.answer: Ethan sent the meeting link by email and text in case one message did not arrive.
questions.answerZh: 伊森透過電郵和短訊發送會議連結，以防其中一則訊息無法送達。
questions.highlight: Ethan sent the meeting link by email and text in case one message did not arrive.

questions.prompt: Their son might spill a drink over his clothes, so the parents packed a change of clothes.
questions.promptZh: 他們的兒子可能會把飲品倒在衣服上，所以父母帶備了一套替換衣物。
questions.answer: The parents packed a change of clothes in case their son spilt a drink over his clothes.
questions.answerZh: 父母帶備了一套替換衣物，以防兒子把飲品倒在衣服上。
questions.highlight: The parents packed a change of clothes in case their son spilt a drink over his clothes.

questions.prompt: The weather might become dangerous, so the organisers have reserved the sports hall.
questions.promptZh: 天氣可能會變得危險，所以主辦單位已預留體育館。
questions.answer: In case the weather becomes dangerous, the organisers have reserved the sports hall.
questions.answerZh: 以防天氣變得危險，主辦單位已預留體育館。
questions.highlight: In case the weather becomes dangerous, the organisers have reserved the sports hall.

questions.prompt: The online booking system may fail, so the theatre keeps a telephone booking line open.
questions.promptZh: 網上訂票系統可能會失靈，所以劇院保留電話訂票服務。
questions.answer: In case the online booking system fails, the theatre keeps a telephone booking line open.
questions.answerZh: 以防網上訂票系統失靈，劇院保留電話訂票服務。
questions.highlight: In case the online booking system fails, the theatre keeps a telephone booking line open.

questions.prompt: The school arranged an extra bus as a backup because the first bus might break down.
questions.promptZh: 學校安排了額外一輛巴士作後備，因為第一輛巴士可能會故障。
questions.answer: The school arranged an extra bus in case the first bus broke down.
questions.answerZh: 學校安排了額外一輛巴士，以防第一輛巴士故障。
questions.highlight: The school arranged an extra bus in case the first bus broke down.

questions.prompt: Maya might be unable to access the company system, so she saved the client's phone number separately.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅可能無法登入公司系統，所以她另外儲存了客戶的電話號碼。
questions.answer: Maya saved the client's phone number separately in case she could not access the company system.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅另外儲存了客戶的電話號碼，以防無法登入公司系統。
questions.highlight: Maya saved the client's phone number separately in case she could not access the company system.

questions.prompt: The hikers might be cold or wet, so the rescue team carried additional blankets.
questions.promptZh: 遠足人士可能會感到寒冷或全身濕透，所以救援隊帶備了額外毛氈。
questions.answer: The rescue team carried additional blankets in case the hikers were cold or wet.
questions.answerZh: 救援隊帶備了額外毛氈，以防遠足人士感到寒冷或全身濕透。
questions.highlight: The rescue team carried additional blankets in case the hikers were cold or wet.

questions.prompt: The lights may go out during an emergency, so staff keep emergency torches by the door.
questions.promptZh: 緊急情況下燈光可能會熄滅，所以職員把應急電筒放在門旁。
questions.answer: Staff keep emergency torches by the door in case the lights go out during an emergency.
questions.answerZh: 職員把應急電筒放在門旁，以防緊急情況下燈光熄滅。
questions.highlight: Staff keep emergency torches by the door in case the lights go out during an emergency.

questions.prompt: The projector might fail, so a printed copy of the report was brought to the meeting.
questions.promptZh: 投影機可能會失靈，所以有人把報告的印刷本帶到會議。
questions.answer: A printed copy of the report was brought to the meeting in case the projector failed.
questions.answerZh: 有人把報告的印刷本帶到會議，以防投影機失靈。
questions.highlight: A printed copy of the report was brought to the meeting in case the projector failed.

questions.prompt: A doctor may need the information unexpectedly, so Leo keeps a list of his medicines in his wallet.
questions.promptZh: 醫生可能會突然需要相關資料，所以里奧在銀包內放有自己的藥物清單。
questions.answer: Leo keeps a list of his medicines in his wallet in case a doctor needs the information.
questions.answerZh: 里奧在銀包內放有自己的藥物清單，以防醫生需要相關資料。
questions.highlight: Leo keeps a list of his medicines in his wallet in case a doctor needs the information.

questions.prompt: Drivers might miss the new entrance, so the council placed temporary signs nearby.
questions.promptZh: 司機可能會錯過新入口，所以當局在附近設置了臨時路牌。
questions.answer: The council placed temporary signs nearby in case drivers missed the new entrance.
questions.answerZh: 當局在附近設置了臨時路牌，以防司機錯過新入口。
questions.highlight: The council placed temporary signs nearby in case drivers missed the new entrance.

questions.prompt: The main speaker might be unable to attend, so the organiser has asked Priya to prepare a short presentation.
questions.promptZh: 主講嘉賓可能未能出席，所以主辦人已請普莉雅準備一段簡短簡報。
questions.answer: In case the main speaker is unable to attend, the organiser has asked Priya to prepare a short presentation.
questions.answerZh: 以防主講嘉賓未能出席，主辦人已請普莉雅準備一段簡短簡報。
questions.highlight: In case the main speaker is unable to attend, the organiser has asked Priya to prepare a short presentation.

questions.prompt: The computer network might stop working during a busy period, so the airport keeps manual check-in forms ready.
questions.promptZh: 電腦網絡可能在繁忙時段停止運作，所以機場備妥人手辦理登機手續的表格。
questions.answer: The airport keeps manual check-in forms ready in case the computer network stops working during a busy period.
questions.answerZh: 機場備妥人手辦理登機手續的表格，以防電腦網絡在繁忙時段停止運作。
questions.highlight: The airport keeps manual check-in forms ready in case the computer network stops working during a busy period.
